docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIWATA, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MINAMI, DALE $750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.00, MUCH OF THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMED DAMAGES WERE NOT SUPPORTED BY THE DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED. DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO THE JUDICIAL OFFICER FOR SIGNATURE. FILED BY DEFENDANT MINAMI, DALE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KIWATA, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT MINAMI, DALE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (3 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KIWATA, RICHARD
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-15-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MINAMI, DALE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-16-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IS "GRANTED" - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
